titleStmt.title: SII 22.283: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 283. (A.R. No. 283 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJAK. MUMMAḌI-CHŌḶADĒVA (RĀJARĀJA I)—4th YEAR (A.D. 988-89)

summary.p: The inscription states that on an enquiry made by Madhurāntakaṉ Gaṇḍarādittaṉār along with the officers Villavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷār, Rājamārttāṇḍa-Mūvēndavēḷār and four others into the affairs of the temple at Tirumālpēṟu, it was found that the property of god Agnīśvara was misappropriated by the staff of the temple for their own use, the daily worship to the deity being confined to the bare offering of rice. The concerned offenders were punished with fines and the six pieces of land measuring together 2(1/2) vēli were ordered to be resumed and the taxes thereon being paid to the Kāmakkōṭṭam (Amman shrine) in the temple. One mā of land at Kuḷattūr and 225 kuḻi at Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr were also added to the main temple (See No. 282 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ko
virājakecari
panmarāṉa śrīmu
mmaṭi coḻa te
varkku yāṇṭu 4
āvatu maturān
takaṉ kaṇṭarāti
ttaṉār tirumāl pe
ṟṟu Āḻvār koyili
l snapaṉa maṇṭapattiley tirumiyāṉattu maṭamu
ṭaiya tiṇṭi piṭārarum Atikārikaḷ villavaṉ muven
taveḷārum cataṉaṉkaṭampaṅkiḻavaṉ civacekaraṉum Irājamārttāṇṭamu
ventaveḷāṉum ciṟṟatikāri Irumpāṭuṭaiyāṉ mutti parameśvaraṉu
m Uṭaṉirukka Ittirumālpeṟṟut tiruagniśvaramuṭaiyār nilaṅka
ḷum nivantamuṅ keṭṭu mutal Ikkoyilil tirukkoyiluṭaiyār
nivantaṅkaḷ ceyyāte muṭṭaviṭṭu Irunāḻi Ariciyāl Avikkāṭṭiṭṭu
Ittevar nilaṅkaḷ Ellām tāṅkaḷe yāṇṭu cellāniṟka I
varkaḷait taṇṭaṅ koṇṭu Iṉṉāḷmutal Ivarkaḷ tāṅkaḷey
lli muṉṉuḷḷapaṭi ceyvatāṉa nivantappaṭi tiru
māṟpeṟṟu (ce) ceṉṉaṟpaḷḷam nilam Oru paṭṭiyum ciṅ
kaṭikuṟai nilam Araiye Oru māvaraiyum koṟṟattai viḷākam
nilam mukkāle muṉṟumāvum kuḻicceṟu nilam Oru paṭṭiyum nel
vāyil paṭap paicceṟu nilaṉ Oṉṟeykālum puliyūrvā
ṇiyaṉceṟu nilaṉ Oṉṟey kālum Āka Ivvūr nilaṉ
Iraṇṭaraiyālum kāmakkoṭṭattukku Iṟai Iṟuttu mikka poka
mum kuḷattūrk kiḻ kaṉinilam Orumā Ikkāmakkoṭṭattukku Iṟai I
(i)ṟuttu mikka pokamum tirumāṟpeṟṟāḻvār tevatāṉa brahmade
yam ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr muṉṟu taṭiyāy Avvūrkkolāl Irunūṟṟu
irupattaiñcu kuḻiyum tirumālpeṟṟāḻvārkku Iṟai Iṟuttu kuṭuttom sabhai paṇippa Eḻutiṉeṉ Alaṅkārappiriyaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
